feedback.text: I see this as a great act to fight against alot of misleading ads be it a mobile game ad that lies or a youtuber shilling another product they have suspiciously used alot despite it being unknown. But i also see it as a way to fix the problem of not owning what you buy especially in the digital landscape of today. With game companies shutting down online services for their games or digital store fronts taking your movies or music away that you paid for because they lost the license to sell it. I just think it should be made that no matter what if you bought something you should be always able to use it this extends to things like downloadable content too and mobile games that shut down. I also think it may help to have it implemented that subscription services especially those for shows and movies should change because too many times people want to watch a certain show or movie and its on some random service they now have to pay for and sometimes high prices to remove ads just to watch one thing. I feel a way to fox this problem could be that anyone could pay the subscription service and have access to all they have to offer or be given the option to just purchase the show or movie outright and then be able to watch it anytime without having to shill out multiple euros a month to multiple services.
